title: Dekton Fatboy Magnet Tape Measure 5m x 25mm | Extra Wide 25mm Blade | Magnetic Tip | Imperial & Metric Units | Anti-Slip Belt Clip | Auto-Lock | Class II Accuracy | Ideal for Professional and DIY Use
features: Belt grip & anti slip rubber grip
description: From the manufacturer 5M FATBOY MAGNETIC-PRO EXTRA WIDE TAPE MEASURE DIY WEEK AWARDS 2021 PRODUCT OF THE YEAR FINALIST HAND TOOL & ACCESSORY PRODUCT OF THE YEAR ADVANCED FEATURES 25M EXTRA WIDE DUAL MARKINGS Class II. 5m x 25mm extra wide. Does not bend easily, stays rigid for longer distances. Dual imperial and metric markings. MAGNETIC TIP Magnetic tip helps to attach itself to metal, making it easier for measuring at any angle and any distance, without the need for a second person. Tough impact resistant case. AUTO-LOCK Auto-lock mechanism helps keep the tape measure to stay on your chosen measurement without it recoiling. Self-locking. Anti-slip rubber clip. Includes belt clip. IDEAL FOR: One person measuring. Measuring long distances without it bending out of shape. Industrial / Construction / Carpentry / DIY and much more. 3M X 19MM HARD CASE TAPE MEASURE 9" SPIRIT LEVEL 100PC SCREWDRIVER SET SIZE 9/L TRADESMAN LATEX COATED WORKING GLOVES 7PC PAINTING KIT Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews — 4.2 out of 5 stars 5 — — 4.0 out of 5 stars 82 Application Ideal for Industrial / Construction / Carpentry / DIY and much more. Three levels. A horizontal, vertical and angle bubble allows exact measurements in horizontal, vertical or 45 degree inclinations 100pc screwdriver set with strong plastic mountable storage stand, ideal for everyday use Ideal for DIY, tradesmen and where high levels of grip and protection is required Ideal for painting a room quickly and easily Dimensions 16 x 10.7 x 4.1 cm 1.5 x 8.5 x 27 cm 35 x 30.5 x 13 cm 12 x 1 x 22 cm 30.5 x 19.5 x 13 cm Weight 140g 90g 2.67kg 52g 626g
